    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java that return ModelElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ModelElement
    KeYRecoderMapping.toRecoder(ModelElement pe)
    returns the Recoder-equivalent to a given ModelElement (KeY).
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.java with parameters of type ModelElement
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    Recoder2KeYConverter.insertToMap(ModelElement r, ModelElement k)
    store an element to the recoder<->key mapping.
    ModelElement
    KeYRecoderMapping.toKeY(ModelElement pe)
    returns a matching ModelElement (KeY) to a given recoder.ModelElement

    Format.toString(String formatText, ModelElement e)
